scripts.build: pnpm --filter './form' build && pnpm --filter './submit' build && pnpm --filter './export' build
scripts.build:staging: pnpm --filter './form' build:staging && pnpm --filter './submit' build && pnpm --filter './export' build
scripts.deploy: pnpm deploy:form && pnpm deploy:submit && pnpm deploy:export
scripts.deploy:staging: pnpm deploy:form:staging && pnpm deploy:submit:staging && pnpm deploy:export:staging
scripts.deploy:production: pnpm deploy:form:production && pnpm deploy:submit:production && pnpm deploy:export:production
scripts.deploy:form:staging: pnpm --filter './form' build:staging && pnpm --filter './form' exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env staging
scripts.deploy:form:production: pnpm --filter './form' build:production && pnpm --filter './form' exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env production
scripts.deploy:submit:staging: pnpm --filter './submit' exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env staging
scripts.deploy:submit:production: pnpm --filter './submit' exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env production
scripts.deploy:export:staging: pnpm --filter './export' exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env staging
scripts.deploy:export:production: pnpm --filter './export' exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env production
scripts.db:migrate:staging: cd submit && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply signup-db-staging --env=staging
scripts.db:migrate:production: cd submit && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply signup-db-production --env=production
